name: Shawboro POLYWOOD Patio Lounge Chair - Threshold™
description: Add style and sophistication to your patio with the Shawboro Patio Lounge Chair by POLYWOOD. This weather-resistant lounger features a wide seat and a reclined silhouette that lets you fully relax in any season. Pair this chair with other pieces from the Shawboro Collection to create a cozy nook you'll enjoy season after season.
